title: epipactis helleborine subsp. renzii
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. renzii, a rare and unique subspecies of the helleborine orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. renzii are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to note that more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these uses.
